perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video starts with a young woman with brown hair in a white gym top running on a treadmill. She looks at the camera and then points to a photo overlay of herself in a blue dress with a larger waistline. (2) The scene shifts to her in a black athletic set performing various gym exercises including weightlifting and leg machines. She is shown in various stages marked by day counters. (3) She transitions to an indoor studio/living room setting, wearing the original white top and a white ruffled skirt. She holds a white product pouch with a banana graphic and consumes it. She demonstrates her slim waist by pulling her clothes tight and smiling at the camera. The video ends with a logo screen.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy electronic background music starts immediately. A young female voice speaks with an excited and upbeat tone. (2) A male voice is heard off-screen asking a question with a skeptical tone. The female voice responds confidently. A sharp whistle sound effect and camera shutter sounds mark transitions between exercise scenes. (3) The female voice continues with a steady, informative narration. The background music remains consistent in tempo. A soft chime or 'ding' sound effect is heard as icons or text appear. The audio concludes with a brief melodic brand jingle.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: '元元 實測14天' (Yuan Yuan 14-day test), '斷糖奶昔『驚人效果』' (Sugar-free milkshake 'amazing results'). (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '2週前' (2 weeks ago), '立馬上鉤' (Hooked immediately), '14天拉蓓奶昔實測開始' (14-day Labelle milkshake test begins), '第1天' to '第14天' (Day 1 to Day 14). (3) Content & Tone: Product benefits are listed: '15克優質蛋白' (15g high-quality protein), '5克膳食纖維' (5g dietary fiber), '500毫克精胺酸' (500mg Arginine), '500毫克BCAA'. The tone is informative and persuasive.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: The video follows an Intro -> Comparison -> Process (Exercise/Product Use) -> Detailed Results -> Call to Action flow.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator appears on screen throughout; 1 male voice is audible but not visible.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long brown hair, typically wearing white or black athletic crop tops and miniskirts.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The gym scenes feature treadmills, weight racks, and exercise machines. The studio scenes show a soft, modern interior with a sofa, a floor lamp, and white walls.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright, even studio lighting with soft shadows.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote Labelle's energy milkshake by documenting a 14-day weight management and fitness challenge undertaken by an influencer. It highlights the product's effectiveness in achieving a slimmer physique when combined with exercise.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of the product, naming of the brand, and a detailed list of nutritional benefits provided by the speaker.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Featured influencer 'Yuan Yuan' (元元) and specific brand logo overlays for Labelle.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video utilizes popular short-form editing techniques such as beat-syncing and fast-paced text overlays to maintain viewer engagement and provide clear nutritional information.
